arts.ttl: Four bold ideas Ruud van Nistelrooy must try to turn Leicester season around
arts.sum: The contrast between the two halves in last Thursday’s defeat to West Ham offered a “big lesson” to the Leicester City players, Ruud van Nisterlooy suggested. Van Nistelrooy said he would use him when he’s better than what they have, but is he not already a better option than having two centre-backs on the bench?

Ruud van Nistelrooy knows where Leicester City problem lies over Jamie Vardy goal struggles
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy retains total faith in striker Jamie Vardy with the Leicester City captain to continue leading the line. “We have to make sure we keep creating chances for our attacking players,” van Nistelrooy said.

arts.ttl: Arsenal stance on Raheem Sterling has emerged after disastrous season for Gunners
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling joined Arsenal from Chelsea on loan in the summer last year. The former Manchester City man, who has the experience of winning the Premier League with Pep Guardiola’s team, was expected to offer experience, depth and quality to Mikel Arteta’s side. arts.sum: Signing an attacker would be a priority at Chelsea in the summer considering how much they have struggled in front of goals this season. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Leicester City Premier League clash predicted as Cole Palmer stars
arts.sum: After losing three games in a row in February, Chelsea will be looking to make it three wins on the bounce when they take on Leicester City in the Premier League later today. After beating bottom-of-the-league Southampton 4-0 in their last Premier League outing, the Blues take on 19th-placed Leicester City later today.
